findings.message: The proposed Firebase rule shape is internally incompatible with the rest of the analysis. It says to match the `keycardAssignments` write pattern, but the live `keycardAssignments` rule requires `newData.exists()`, which forbids deletions. The same analysis also requires archive and delete flows to write `fridgeStorage/<occupantId> = null`. Fixed in final revision.
The rules-test plan was incomplete for delete/null-write case. Fixed in final revision: test plan now includes allowed-delete assertion.
